name: PER_MASS_ERROR_LINES
description: Stores error information generated during the processing of a mass action.

columns.Name: MASS_ACTION_ERROR_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: MASS_ACTION_LINE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_MASS_ACTION_LINES  table.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ORIGINATING_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: Name of the AM running update and catching error.

columns.Name: ROW_STATUS
columns.Comments: Whether line is in error or warning.

columns.Name: MSG_TEXT
columns.Comments: Exception generated by method running the update.

columns.Name: MSG_ERROR_ID
columns.Comments: Reference Identifier for error message.

columns.Name: PARAMETER_01
columns.Comments: Descriptive field used by Batch Loader: Used to hold parameter values

columns.Comments: Descriptive field used by Batch Loader: Used to hold parameter values

columns.Name: LOADER_BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the batch processed by batch loader.

columns.Name: STACKTRACE
columns.Comments: Contents of error generated (java stacktrace).

columns.Name: ERROR_STACK
columns.Comments: Short version of error generated.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SEC_OBJ_NAME
columns.Comments: This is to Store the object Name on which error line needs to be secured

columns.Name: SEC_PRIV_NAME
columns.Comments: This is to store the Date privilege name on which error line needs to be secured

columns.Name: SEC_KEY1
columns.Comments: To Store the  first Security Key attribute for evaluating Security

columns.Name: SEC_KEY2
columns.Comments: To Store the  second  Security Key attribute for evaluating Security if it is date line Effective Start date

columns.Comments: To Store the  third  Security Key attribute for evaluating Security if it is date line Effective end date

columns.Name: SEC_KEY4
columns.Comments: To Store the  fourth  Security Key attribute for evaluating Security if it is date line Effective latest changes

columns.Name: SEC_KEY5
columns.Comments: To store any extra Security attributes

columns.Comments: To store any extra Security attributes
